Articles

Articles, essays, and thematic series

This section is designed as the website's ongoing publishing space, gathering original articles, selected externally published pieces, and future thematic series in a clear archive.

Purpose

A living publication archive

The articles section is intended to document ongoing intellectual output and organize it by topic, series, and publication context.

Scalability

Built for continuous growth

The current site structure is prepared to receive entries gradually while preserving a coherent archive for browsing and long-term reference.

Planned content types

  • Original website essays and articles.
  • Selected externally published writings.
  • Thematic series and topic-based groupings.
  • Summaries and categories for easier navigation.

Initial sample entries

Provisional article records

Digital Scholarly Publishing | 2026-04-05

On Building a Structured Scholarly Digital Presence

A provisional article entry about the importance of a personal scholarly website as a durable academic archive.

About the site

Dr. Haitham A. El-Ghareeb | Personal Scholarly Website

An initial launch edition of a bilingual scholarly website presenting academic work, publications, and research directions.
